meaning: 通过拟人化的动物互动，教导幼儿辨别陌生人、树立安全意识，同时传递家庭温暖与信任的美好价值观。
characterDescription: A cute, fluffy white rabbit with long pink-lined ears, big shiny black eyes, and a small round nose. The rabbit wears a simple red bow tie. The wolf has grey fur, sharp but comical-looking teeth, and wears a striped scarf to look slightly mischievous but not terrifying.
styleDescription: Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded shapes, high contrast suitable for infants, warm lighting, flat vector aesthetic with soft gradients.

scenes.title: 妈妈出门
scenes.description: 兔妈妈背起小篮子，温柔地摸了摸小兔子的头，转身离开家门。小兔子站在门口，双手挥舞，脸上带着乖巧又略带不舍的微笑。
scenes.prompt: A cute, fluffy white rabbit with long pink-lined ears, big shiny black eyes, and a small round nose. The rabbit wears a simple red bow tie. The wolf has grey fur, sharp but comical-looking teeth, and wears a striped scarf to look slightly mischievous but not terrifying., A cute white rabbit mother waving goodbye at the door of a cozy wooden house, holding a small basket. A smaller baby rabbit stands at the threshold, waving back with a sweet smile. Bright sunny morning light, colorful garden background, soft edges, bright cartoon style., Focus on the interaction at the doorway, showing separation but safety., Bright cartoon style, vibrant colors, soft rounded shapes, high contrast suitable for infants, warm lighting, flat vector aesthetic with soft gradients.
scenes.narration: 小兔子乖乖，把门儿开开
scenes.compositionHint: Focus on the interaction at the doorway, showing separation but safety.

scenes.title: 妈妈呼唤
scenes.description: 兔妈妈在门外，身体微微前倾，嘴巴张开正在唱歌。小兔子趴在窗边，耳朵竖得高高的，眼神好奇又专注地听着。

scenes.title: 妈妈解释
scenes.description: 兔妈妈指着天空中的太阳，表情开心且肯定。小兔子恍然大悟，双手拍在一起，脸上露出安心的笑容，准备去开门。

scenes.title: 大灰狼伪装
scenes.description: 大灰狼躲在树后，只露出一半身体，眯着眼睛假装温柔地说话，手里还拿着一个花环试图讨好。小兔子警惕地捂住耳朵，眉头微皱，摇头拒绝。

scenes.title: 再次确认
scenes.description: 大灰狼有些着急，大声喊叫，样子变得有点滑稽。小兔子从门缝里探出头，竖起一根手指，坚定地摇头，眼神清澈无邪。

scenes.title: 妈妈归来
scenes.description: 兔妈妈回到门口，脸上洋溢着幸福的笑容，张开双臂。小兔子欢快地跳起来，奔向妈妈，画面充满动感与喜悦。

scenes.title: 温馨团圆
scenes.description: 兔妈妈抱着小兔子坐在草地上，旁边放着篮子和大灰狼留下的花环（作为教具）。两者都面带微笑，背景是温暖的夕阳，传达安全与爱的主题。
